# polymarket_holders (Data Source)

Lists the top holders of each outcome token in a market, identified by its condition ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Top holders of each outcome token in a market, by condition ID.
data "polymarket_market" "m" { id = "540817" }

data "polymarket_holders" "top" {
  market = data.polymarket_market.m.condition_id
  limit  = 5
}

output "holder_count" {
  value = sum([for g in data.polymarket_holders.top.tokens : length(g.holders)])
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `market` (String) Condition ID of the market whose holders to list (a `0x`-prefixed hash). This is the only required input.

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of holders to return per outcome token.

### Read-Only

- `tokens` (Attributes List) Per-outcome-token groups, each listing that token's top holders. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tokens))

<a id="nestedatt--tokens"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tokens`

Read-Only:

- `holders` (Attributes List) Top holders of the token, ordered by amount held descending. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tokens--holders))
- `token` (String) CLOB token ID this group of holders is for.

<a id="nestedatt--tokens--holders"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tokens.holders`

Read-Only:

- `amount` (Number) Number of shares of the token held.
- `name` (String) Display name of the holder, when public.
- `outcome_index` (Number) Zero-based index of the outcome the token represents.
- `proxy_wallet` (String) On-chain proxy wallet address of the holder.
- `pseudonym` (String) Auto-generated pseudonym of the holder.
- `verified` (Boolean) Whether the holder's account is verified.
